case_title: BARCLAYS BANK DELAWARE VS. IVAN S TAM ET AL

docket_entries.description: EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF BARCLAYS BANK DELAWARE AS TO DEFENDANT TAM, IVAN S DOES 1 TO 5 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  SEP-05-2017

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BARCLAYS BANK DELAWARE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT TAM, IVAN S $4,538.07 PRINCIPAL, $348.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,886.57, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 100040260)
